title: viola spathulata var. delirensis
intro: Viola spathulata var. delirensis, also known as Chinese Heartleaf or Chinese Viola, is a plant species belonging to the violet family (Violaceae) and is native to China. The medicinal properties of Viola spathulata var. delirensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, Viola spathulata var. delirensis is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal capsules or supplements.
